name: Lemon Cranberry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
2. Prepare the pastry dough for the pie crust and bake it according to package instructions.
3. In a small saucepan, combine the cranberry sauce, cornstarch, and sugar over medium heat until thickened and bubbly.
4. Pour the prepared filling into the baked pastry shell.
5. Turn off the oven heat after placing the filled pie in the oven.
